function createCause(string ipfsCid, uint256 goal, uint256 deadline) returns (uint256 causeId)
function donate(uint256 causeId, uint256 amount) returns (bool)
function getCause(uint256 causeId) view returns (address creator, string ipfsCid, uint256 goal, uint256 raised, uint256 deadline, bool active)
function getCauses(uint256 offset, uint256 limit) view returns (uint256[])
event CauseCreated(uint256 indexed causeId, address indexed creator, string ipfsCid, uint256 goal)
event Donated(uint256 indexed causeId, address indexed donor, uint256 amount)
event GoalReached(uint256 indexed causeId, uint256 totalRaised)
